metadata.description: A reality-check skill for Claude Code that cuts the ideas you are too in love with. Anchors the real goal, researches the real world, and tells you what to kill.

plugins.name: kill-your-darlings
plugins.description: Reality-check and 'kill your darlings' partner for any project, plan, draft, feature, or pitch. Anchors the goal, researches reality instead of assuming, names the ego-driven darlings, and returns an evidence-backed keep/cut/rework verdict plus a get-back-on-track plan.
